_doc: Thin-air farming target registry — researched live opportunities (June 2026). EV-ranked. 'mesh' = the Macs can run it (your edge over single-laptop farmers). HONEST: airdrop farming is speculative — many never pay, sybil filters are real, some projects are scams. Flagged per target. I track/surface/automate; YOU sign up, hold keys, and claim. est_low/high are USD; recurring=monthly (DePIN), else one-time lump on TGE.
_strategy: 2026 reality (researched): merit-based scoring rewards NODES + contract-deploys + GitHub-linked wallets far above swaps. 45% of testnets sybil-filter via GitHub. Consistency > one big move (repeated snapshots). One genuine wallet narrative beats many fakes. The mesh's edge = running nodes laptops can't.

targets.name: Honeygain
targets.note: Most established (since 2019), pays cash incl. PayPal. Run on every node. Reliable baseline.

targets.name: Grass (getgrass.io)
targets.note: Browser node; GRASS token cashable on Binance. Earns + airdrop upside. <10min install.

targets.name: Nodepay
targets.note: Chromium/Brave extension, idle-only (auto-pauses when you stream/game). DePIN+AI airdrop.

targets.name: Pawns.app
targets.note: Cash bandwidth (PayPal). Stacks with Honeygain on the same node.

targets.name: Gradient (Sentry Nodes)
targets.note: Browser extension node on Solana; points → token. Pure airdrop play.

targets.name: UpRock
targets.note: Mobile+desktop bandwidth/AI data; UPT rewards.

targets.name: Aleph Zero — testnet validator
targets.note: Official Testnet Validator AIRDROP for node operators — explicitly rewards validators. High-merit, your mesh edge. Needs setup + uptime.

targets.name: Shardeum — incentivized testnet node
targets.note: Run a validator node on the incentivized testnet → airdrop chance. CPU-runnable on the Macs.

targets.name: Analog — testnet node operator (Phase 3)
targets.note: Node-operator phase rewards. Merit-scored.

targets.name: Berachain — testnet activity
targets.note: L1, liquidity-driven consensus; testnet + ecosystem dApps. High buzz.

targets.name: Extension-Nodes (0xmoei curated)
targets.note: Curated list of browser-extension nodes to run for incentives. Stack many on the mesh = many free call-options.

targets.name: Zama — fhEVM confidential testnet
targets.note: Top-rated AI airdrop: encrypted interactions + contract deploys on fhEVM testnet, confirmed multi-phase. Strong funding.

targets.name: Sphinx Protocol
targets.note: Active testnet, AI category leader per research. Verify official link before acting.

targets.name: Zeko
targets.note: Mina L2, AI/ZK. Active testnet.

targets.name: MetaMask — confirmed TGE
targets.note: Highest-potential upcoming drop. Use MetaMask Swaps/Bridge/Portfolio genuinely; long-confirmed TGE. Likely huge allocation.

targets.name: Polymarket — prediction market
targets.note: Prediction market = doubles as your 'world-song' sentiment signal AND an airdrop farm. Trade real markets, qualify for the drop. Ties to omnione.

targets.name: Base — onchain activity
targets.note: Coinbase L2; consistent onchain activity + ecosystem dApps. Points programs run on top.

targets.name: Hyperliquid — perp DEX
targets.note: Perp DEX; trading volume → points. COIN-M-adjacent practice ground. Past drops were large.

targets.name: Layer3
targets.note: 1M+ users, 25 chains; XP/levels → exclusive airdrops. Curated multi-step quests = guided onchain activity that also qualifies you elsewhere.

targets.name: Galxe (Season 7)
targets.note: 26M users; campaigns = follow/like/onchain tasks → points. Season 7 prize pool live. Daily 5-min habit.

targets.name: Zealy
targets.note: Community quest sprints per project; early-community narrative = strong sybil story.

targets.name: Lolli (BTC shopping cashback)
targets.note: Browser extension: up to 30% BTC cashback at 1000+ stores. Bi-product of shopping you'd do anyway — pure no-money-down.

targets.name: Learn-to-earn (Binance/Coinbase/CMC)
targets.note: Watch a short video + quiz → free tokens. Zero-risk, repeatable across Binance/Coinbase/CoinMarketCap.

targets.name: Faucets (drip)
targets.note: Tiny per-claim; the mesh can automate visits. Testnet gas (for node farming) + small mainnet drips.

targets.name: Immunefi bug bounties
targets.note: Up to $200k for a critical smart-contract vuln. Skill-gated (audit). Highest single-payout no-capital path that exists.

targets.name: Code4rena / Sherlock audit contests
targets.note: Competitive audit contests; payout by findings. Learn-as-you-earn for devs.

targets.name: Gitcoin dev bounties
targets.note: Task-based: $50 scraper → $5k tooling. Caution: 4/23 bounty programs are scams — vet before working.

targets.name: Optimism RetroPGF (fund our open-source)
targets.note: $100M+ allocated retroactively for public goods. OUR open-source mining/income dashboard could qualify — get paid for what we already built.

targets.name: Gitcoin Grants (our tooling)
targets.note: Quadratic-funded grants for open-source. List the lab/dashboard as a project — $60M+ has been channeled to builders.

targets.name: LaborX (Web3 freelancing, paid in crypto)
targets.note: Sell skills (dev/design/writing) for crypto. Bi-product of work you can already do.

targets.name: Move-to-earn (fitness)
targets.note: Modest, stable payouts for activity you do anyway. Use free tiers (some need an NFT — that's capital, skip).

targets.name: $100 moonshot (HOT wallet)
targets.note: ~$30 meme/momentum lottery from the walled HOT wallet. Expendable. The XRP never signs anything.

targets.name: Telegram tap-to-earn (Dropee/X-Empire/Blum)
targets.note: ~5 min/day on phone, airdrop-shaped. Dropee = best current (TON). HONEST: cap at ~10min/day or it is a time-drain; most pay little. Portfolio + time-cap, do not do everything.

targets.name: Points programs (EigenLayer/Rainbow/etc.)
targets.note: Points = the new airdrop (pre-TGE). Genuinely USE a protocol -> earn points -> future token. Needs small onchain activity (gas). Retroactive snapshots reward early real use; lottery-shaped upside.

targets.name: Farcaster (proof-of-humanity + points)
targets.note: HIGH leverage: a Farcaster account = Neynar proof-of-humanity that boosts sybil-resistance across ALL your farming + its own points + Frames. One account compounds everywhere. AI drafts casts, your identity posts.

targets.name: Base onchain history (pre-airdrop)
targets.note: Build genuine onchain history on Base before a potential Coinbase-L2 distribution. Cheap gas. Pairs with Base Builder Rewards + a Base integration in the dashboard = real (not farmed) activity.

targets.name: Cookie.fun InfoFi (content rewards)
targets.note: Surviving attention play after X killed yap-to-earn (Kaito Yaps sunset Jan 2026, X banned reward-for-posting). Rewards quality crypto-Twitter content analysis. AI drafts; your identity/judgment ships it.
